channel.title: cozy-soup-posts Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh cozy-soup-posts posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Cozy Creamy Roasted Carrot Soup with Fresh Herbs
item.description: This carrot soup is all about slow-roasted carrots that bring out deep sweetness, blended into a silky, comforting bowl with fresh herbs. Ideal for chilly evenings or a light, nourishing lunch.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 45 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 pounds fresh carrots, peeled and cut into chunks
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 large onion, chopped
  • 3 garlic cloves, minced
  • 4 cups vegetable broth
  • 1/2 cup heavy cream or coconut milk
  • 1 teaspoon fresh thyme leaves
  • 1 teaspoon fresh parsley, chopped
  • Salt and pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fresh #olive #large

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Cozy Creamy Roasted Carrot Soup with Fresh Herbs
media:content.media:description: This carrot soup is all about slow-roasted carrots that bring out deep sweetness, blended into a silky, comforting bowl with fresh herbs. Ideal for chilly evenings or a light, nourishing lunch.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, fresh, olive, large

item.title: Silky Carrot and Ginger Soup with a Cozy Zing
item.description: This carrot and ginger soup is wonderfully smooth with a fresh ginger kick that warms you up. Slow simmering brings out rich flavors, making it a perfect cozy meal for chilly nights or when you want something soothing.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 lb carrots, peeled and chopped
  • 1 tablespoon fresh ginger, grated
  • 1 medium onion, chopped
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 4 cups vegetable broth
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • Salt and black pepper to taste
  • Optional: 1/4 cup coconut milk for creaminess
  • Fresh parsley or chives for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #carrots #tablespoon #medium

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Silky Carrot and Ginger Soup with a Cozy Zing
media:content.media:description: This carrot and ginger soup is wonderfully smooth with a fresh ginger kick that warms you up. Slow simmering brings out rich flavors, making it a perfect cozy meal for chilly nights or when you want something soothing.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, carrots, tablespoon, medium

item.title: Cozy Chicken and Wild Rice Soup for Chilly Evenings
item.description: This chicken and wild rice soup is like a warm hug in a bowl. Tender chicken, earthy wild rice, and fresh herbs simmer slowly to build deep, comforting flavors. Perfect for chilly spring nights or anytime you crave cozy comfort!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons olive oil, room temperature
  • 1 medium onion, finely chopped
  • 2 carrots, peeled and diced
  • 2 celery stalks, diced
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 teaspoon dried thyme
  • 1 teaspoon dried rosemary
  • 1 cup wild rice, rinsed
  • 6 cups chicken broth, low sodium
  • 2 cups cooked chicken, shredded
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • Fresh parsley, chopped, for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Mediumpost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #olive #medium #carrots

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Cozy Chicken and Wild Rice Soup for Chilly Evenings
media:content.media:description: This chicken and wild rice soup is like a warm hug in a bowl. Tender chicken, earthy wild rice, and fresh herbs simmer slowly to build deep, comforting flavors. Perfect for chilly spring nights or anytime you crave cozy comfort!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Mediumpost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, olive, medium, carrots

item.title: Velvety Roasted Cauliflower Soup That Warms You Inside Out
item.description: This creamy cauliflower soup is the ultimate cozy comfort food. Roasting the cauliflower first brings out a rich, nutty flavor that makes every spoonful feel like a warm hug. Perfect for chilly spring nights!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 large head cauliflower, cut into florets
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 medium onion, chopped
  • 3 garlic cloves, minced
  • 4 cups vegetable broth
  • 1/2 cup heavy cream or coconut cream
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1/4 teaspoon smoked paprika (optional)
  • Fresh parsley or chives for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #large #olive #medium

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Velvety Roasted Cauliflower Soup That Warms You Inside Out
media:content.media:description: This creamy cauliflower soup is the ultimate cozy comfort food. Roasting the cauliflower first brings out a rich, nutty flavor that makes every spoonful feel like a warm hug. Perfect for chilly spring nights!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, large, olive, medium

item.title: Fresh Pea and Mint Soup That Warms You Inside on Chilly Spring Nights
item.description: This fresh pea and mint soup is super light but still cozy enough for cool evenings. The mint brings a fresh pop that makes it feel lively and bright. It’s perfect when you want something simple and satisfying without the heaviness.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons olive oil, extra virgin
  • 1 medium onion, finely chopped
  • 2 garlic cloves, minced
  • 4 cups fresh or frozen peas
  • 4 cups vegetable broth
  • 1/4 cup fresh mint leaves, loosely packed
  • Salt and black pepper, to taste
  • 1/2 cup plain Greek yogurt (optional, for creaminess)
  • Juice of half a lemon

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #olive #medium #garlic

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fresh Pea and Mint Soup That Warms You Inside on Chilly Spring Nights
media:content.media:description: This fresh pea and mint soup is super light but still cozy enough for cool evenings. The mint brings a fresh pop that makes it feel lively and bright. It’s perfect when you want something simple and satisfying without the heaviness.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, olive, medium, garlic

item.title: Cozy Creamy Mushroom and Fresh Pea Soup for Chilly Nights
item.description: This creamy mushroom and pea soup feels like a warm hug on cold evenings. Fresh peas add a subtle sweetness while earthy mushrooms bring depth. Made in one pot, it’s super easy and perfect for quick dinners.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons olive oil, room temperature
  • 1 medium onion, finely chopped
  • 3 garlic cloves, minced
  • 10 ounces cremini mushrooms, sliced
  • 4 cups vegetable broth, warm
  • 2 cups fresh peas, shelled
  • 1/2 cup heavy cream, chilled
  • 1 teaspoon fresh thyme leaves
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • Optional: crusty bread, for serving

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230166734 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #olive #medium #garlic

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Cozy Creamy Mushroom and Fresh Pea Soup for Chilly Nights
media:content.media:description: This creamy mushroom and pea soup feels like a warm hug on cold evenings. Fresh peas add a subtle sweetness while earthy mushrooms bring depth. Made in one pot, it’s super easy and perfect for quick dinners.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230166734, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, olive, medium, garlic
